player_notes.karl-anthony towns: Knicks coach Mike Brown stated it is 'extremely important' to get Towns more touches late in games after his underuse was flagged in Game 3 loss. Positive indicator for Points and Rebounds props in Game 4.
player_notes.victor wembanyama: Posted 32 pts, 8 reb, 6 ast in Game 3 win; no flagrant foul assessed for Brunson shove, so no suspension risk. High-volume performance trending for all prop categories in Game 4.
player_notes.jalen brunson: Took blame for Game 3 loss; expect elevated usage and shot attempts as Knicks' primary initiator in a must-win Game 4 framing. No injury concerns noted.

game_notes.SAS vs NYK: Knicks hold 2-1 series lead heading into Game 4; Mike Brown signaling intentional scheme adjustment to feed KAT more, which may redistribute touches away from perimeter players.
